￼
￼

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks a lot for your thoughtful feedback—we really appreciate it!

We understand your concern about the audience. While the game is rated 17+, we know that younger players may still access it. To help with this, we’ve added Private Matches so you can play with friends in a more controlled environment, and we’re continuing to improve our reporting tools.

We also hear your feedback about finishers and progression. We’re actively exploring improvements, including systems like ranking, to make the experience more rewarding over time.

Thanks again for your support and for noticing how much work the team has put into the game—it really means a lot. Please reach out and share more details with us on Discord: http://discord.gg/etermaxrstudio

reviews.review_description: Club Fight is exactly what it promises: chaotic, brutal, and unapologetically bloody. The fights feel raw and intense, and the physics make every hit satisfying. It’s not a game for people looking for something clean or polished — it’s messy, violent, and that’s exactly why it’s fun. If you enjoy over-the-top combat and don’t mind the blood, Club Fight delivers a wild and entertaining experience.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for sharing your experience—we’re sorry to hear this was your impression.

We’re actively working to improve the community experience. We’ve introduced reporting tools to better handle toxic behavior, racism, teaming, and spawn killing, and we’re continuously refining how reports are reviewed.

We’ve also added Private Matches, so you can play in a more controlled environment with friends and avoid disruptive players.

Regarding age, the game is rated 17+, but due to platform limitations we can’t fully prevent younger players from joining. That said, we’re taking steps to improve moderation and player safety.

We’re committed to making the game a better place to play, and your feedback helps us get there.

Please reach out and share more details with us on Discord: http://discord.gg/etermaxrstudio or via support: https://www.etermax.com/support

If you notice these improvements helping, we’d be grateful if you considered updating your review.

Club Fight is a fun and chaotic VR experience with great physics-based gameplay. The freedom of interaction makes every fight unique and entertaining. A great choice for players looking for a action-packed VR game.

reviews.review_title: Wild, Bloody, and a Lot of Fun
reviews.review_description: Club Fight is pure chaos in the best way. The combat feels intense and the amount of blood makes every fight feel brutal and impactful. It’s definitely not a clean or polite game — it’s messy, violent, and completely over the top. That’s exactly what makes it so entertaining. If you enjoy raw, physics-driven fights and don’t mind things getting very bloody, this game is a blast.

developer_response.body:
Hi! If you  hit or shoot other players with the weapons, you will see the blood. Also, if you claim the Devil's Hands finisher (it's free) or buy one, you will see more gore.
